description_long: This house features a combination of brick and light-colored exterior walls, with a prominent dark gable roof covering the main section and a flat roof over an adjoining wing. The structure includes large windows and glass doors, providing ample natural light and a modern touch. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and landscaped garden beds, with several mature trees and shrubs adding greenery. The backyard area includes a patio with outdoor furniture and a small paved section, ideal for relaxation or gatherings. The house appears to have a single story with an open, spacious interior layout visible through the cutaway views. The overall design blends traditional brickwork with contemporary elements, making it suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story brick house with a dark gable roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring both modern and traditional design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a flat-roofed section with a brick facade and green lawn.
description_view_1: Side and partial interior view revealing the open-plan layout, backyard patio, and garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the backyard, outdoor seating area, garden beds, and the transition between the gable and flat roof sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the gable end, additional garden space, and a clear look at the house's depth and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door with sidelights, no porch, and a simple, modern design with direct access to the lawn.
